1.description: Get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: Select parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m2 with geometry

3.description: Select 200-year flood zones filtered to Drammen extent (bbox to be embedded after step1 result)

4.description: Spatially join parcels (left) with 200-year flood zones (right) by intersection

5.description: Count number of 200-year flood zones intersecting each parcel and keep parcel attributes

6.description: Sort parcels by parcel area descending
